subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-'Abidin! The Manifest Book hath been revealed, yet have they denied it and turned away from the fragrant breezes of revelation wafting therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین العابدین کتاب مبین نازل انکارش نموده اند نفحات وحی متضوع از آن اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf]
